ip_outcome_note: Card name reads 'Intensifying Power Trunks'. Character field confirmed as 'Trunks: GT'. Trunks is the half-Saiyan son of Vegeta and Bulma; in Dragon Ball GT he accompanies Goku and Pan into space. This is specifically GT-era Kid Trunks (not Future Trunks). Identity unambiguous from card name and character field.

trivia_bullets.text: BT4-012 is a green Uncommon Battle card: 5000 power, 5000 combo power, 1-green energy cost. Auto ability: when this card attacks, you may add a life card to hand; if you do, it gains +10000 power and a Critical-equivalent life-Drop effect for the turn — a life-to-power trade mechanic that rewards aggression. Trait: Saiyan/Earthling, Era: Baby Saga, Character: Trunks: GT. [Source: WebSearch snippet via DBZ Exchange BT4-012 listing]

BT4-012 was also distributed as a promo card in the 2019 DBS TCG Event Pack 03, giving it a wider print run than a typical Uncommon. The Event Pack version carries the PR stamp rather than the standard set frame. [Source: WebSearch snippet via CoreTCG Event Pack 03 listing]
sources: CoreTCG: Intensifying Power Trunks Event Pack 03 listing

trivia_bullets.text: In Dragon Ball GT, Trunks (depicted here as a teenager) serves as one of three main protagonists alongside Goku and Pan during the Black Star Dragon Ball space arc. A notable design note: Akira Toriyama later admitted he did not know who Future Trunks was when that character first appeared in DBZ — only afterward deciding Trunks was Vegeta and Bulma's child, a reveal that shocked the editorial team. [Source: Screen Rant: 'Not Even Dragon Ball's Creator Knew Who Future Trunks Was When He Debuted']
sources: Screen Rant: Dragon Ball Future Trunks identity reveal

related_cards.name: Power of Friendship Pan
related_cards.note: BT4-009 — Pan is Trunks' GT companion; the two travel together with Goku in the space arc

related_cards.name: Blazing Spirit Son Goku
related_cards.note: BT4-005 — Goku is the third member of the GT space-arc trio alongside Trunks and Pan
